incidents.name: Connection failures for organizations restricting GitHub access by IP address

incident_updates.body: This incident has been resolved.
A fix has been implemented and we are monitoring the results.

We have identified an issue affecting organizations that restrict GitHub access by source IP address. A recent infrastructure change altered the IP addresses Anthropic uses for outbound connections to GitHub, which may cause Claude Code remote sessions, GitHub Enterprise plugin syncing, and Claude Security to fail. We are reverting the change to restore the previous IP ranges; no allowlist changes will be needed on your side. We will post an update once the fix is deployed.

incidents.name: Claude.ai unavailable and elevated errors on the API

incident_updates.body: This incident has been resolved.
We are seeing success rates across all services return to normal, and are monitoring closely to prevent any further issues. Impact occurred from 17:34–18:52 UTC.
We are continuing to work to resolve the issues preventing users from accessing Claude.ai, and causing elevated authentication errors for requests to the API and Claude Code.

We have identified an issue resulting in elevated errors on the Anthropic API, as well as issues accessing Claude.ai, including log-in paths for Claude Code. We are working to resolve these issues, and will provide an update as soon as possible.

incidents.name: Claude Code v2.1.120 Crashes on Startup

incident_updates.body: This incident has been resolved.

We have identified an issue in Claude Code version 2.1.120 that causes a crash when resuming a prior session via the --resume or --continue flags. Auto-update will move affected clients back to 2.1.119 on next check, but you can always run `claude install 2.1.119`.

incidents.name: Issues with responses using structured outputs on the API

incident_updates.body: We have identified and resolved an issue which resulted in issues with model responses when making use of structured outputs via the Anthropic API between 16:10 UTC on April 22 and 01:59 UTC on April 23. During this period, structured outputs containing some forms of grammar requirements returned with reduced quality. This did not impact any requests not using structured outputs, as detailed here: https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/build-with-claude/structured-outputs.
This incident has been resolved.
